summary.lv: Epic Frog meklē Data Engineer, kurš izstrādās datu cauruļvadus un analītiskos risinājumus. Darbs klātienē Rīgā, atalgojums €3500–6000 mēnesī.
summary.en: Epic Frog is seeking a Data Engineer to build data pipelines and analytical solutions in an on-site role in Riga, offering €3,500–6,000/month.
